ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: CARAMEL 50% (GLUCOSE SYRUP, SUGAR, SWEETENED CONDENSED _MILK_, INVERT SUGAR SYRUP, PALM OIL, FLAVOURING, EMULSIFIER (_SOYA_ LECITHIN)), _MILK_ CHOCOLATE 33% (SUGAR, COCOA BUTTER, COCOA MASS, STANDARDISED WHOLE _MILK_, SKIMMED _MILK_ POWDER, PALM OIL, SHEA BUTTER, EMULSIFIER (SOYA LECITHIN), FLAVOURING), WAFER 17% (FORTIFIED _WHEAT_ FLOUR (_WHEAT_ FLOUR, CALCIUM CARBONATE, IRON, NIACIN, THIAMINE), SUGAR, RAPESEED OIL, RAISING AGENT (SODIUM BICARBONATE), SALT, EMULSIFIER (_SOYA_ LECITHIN)).
